title: • Choose:
content:
• Choose:
    1. Adapt a classical text
    2. Create a new 25–40 min participatory work
    3. Run micro-prototypes to test hypotheses
  • Output: A working theatrical piece + documented case study

    • Phase 3: Codification (Weeks 8–12)


    • Develop:
      • Parameter mapping methodology
      • Failure modes and emergence patterns
      • Writer’s workflow and governance principles
    • Output: 15–20 page “Narrative Design Handbook for Participatory Performance”

    ---

    Funding & Compensation



    Target Grants (2025–2026):
    • Ars Electronica/Mozarteum XR (€40K)
    • Creative Capital ($15K–$50K)
    • S+T+ARTS Prize (€20K)
    • Plus residencies and microgrants (total realistic: $75K–$115K)

    Your Compensation Once Funded:
    • Development fee: $12K
    • Performance fee: $2K
context: From document: Invitation to Collaborate: Omni-Dromenon-Engine Narrative Co-Architecture — chunk 3 (chunk 3/5)
